articles.title: Welcome to Luogu Cloud Drive
articles.author: Tony Tim
articles.excerpt: Luogu Cloud Drive is now live! Get 256MB of free space upon login, support for various file types, WebDAV mounting, and fast CPOauth login.
content: Welcome to Luogu Cloud Drive. Get 256MB of free space upon login.
The cloud drive supports uploading various file types and WebDAV mounting.
No more tedious login steps! You can use [CPOauth](https://cpoauth.com) for quick login!

articles.title: How to Submit to JSLY's Public Blog
articles.author: JSLY
articles.excerpt: JSLY's Public Blog is an open community column. This guide walks you through submitting an article, from creating an Issue to content formatting.
content: JSLY's Public Blog is the community submission column of the blog. Anyone can submit articles and share knowledge, experiences, and insights with more readers.
The submission process is very simple. Two methods are available:
On the [Public Blog homepage](/public/), click the "Submit via GitHub" button. You will be redirected to GitHub's Issue creation page with the submission template loaded.
Fill in the following information according to the template:
> The author name will automatically use your GitHub username.
Don't have a GitHub account? Simply send an email to [submit@blog.jsly.asia](mailto:submit@blog.jsly.asia) or [2029872426@qq.com](mailto:2029872426@qq.com). Please include:
- **Author Name** (the name you want to display)
I will manually add your article to the Public Blog.
### Step 3: Wait for Review (Same for Both Methods)
After submission, I will be notified and review the content. Approved articles will appear in the Public Blog article list.
Standard Markdown syntax is supported. Here are some common formats:
Syntax highlighting is supported for multiple languages:
1. **Originality**: Please submit your own original work. Reposts require the original author's permission.
2. **Content Guidelines**: Content must comply with applicable laws and regulations.
3. **License**: By submitting, you agree to publish your article under the AGPL-3.0 license.
4. **Review Standards**: Reviews focus on format and compliance, not on subjective opinions.
**Q: Do I need a GitHub account to submit?**
A: Not necessarily. The GitHub method requires an account, but you can also submit via email to submit@blog.jsly.asia or 2029872426@qq.com.
**Q: Can I modify my article after publication?**
A: Yes. Submit an Issue or contact me to update it.
**Q: How long does the review take?**
That's the complete submission guide. If you have an article ready, go ahead and [submit](/public/) now!
Looking forward to your exciting contributions 🚀
